message.content:
{
  "items": [
    {
      "title": "ALLBUS 2018 (German General Social Survey)",
      "description": "National survey of attitudes and social structure in Germany; includes variables on fear of crime, perceived safety, and confidence in the police and courts.",
      "host": "GESIS",
      "countries": ["Germany"],
      "year": 2018,
      "keywords": ["Crime", "Law enforcement", "Police", "Courts", "Safety", "Victimization"]
    },
    {
      "title": "ALLBUS 2014 (German General Social Survey)",
      "description": "German population survey capturing attitudes and behaviors; covers trust in law enforcement, courts, and feelings of safety in the local area.",
      "host": "GESIS",
      "countries": ["Germany"],
      "year": 2014,
      "keywords": ["Crime", "Law enforcement", "Police", "Courts", "Safety", "Confidence"]
    },
    {
      "title": "ALLBUS 2012 (German General Social Survey)",
      "description": "Comprehensive German survey including measures of fear of crime, victimization experiences, and confidence in police and judicial institutions.",
      "host": "GESIS",
      "countries": ["Germany"],
      "year": 2012,
      "keywords": ["Crime", "Law enforcement", "Police", "Courts", "Victimization", "Safety"]
    },
    {
      "title": "ALLBUS 2008 (German General Social Survey)",
      "description": "German national survey of attitudes; includes items on perceived neighborhood safety, fear of crime, and trust in police and courts.",
      "host": "GESIS",
      "countries": ["Germany"],
      "year": 2008,
      "keywords": ["Crime", "Law enforcement", "Police", "Courts", "Safety"]
    },
    {
      "title": "European Social Survey Round 10 – Germany",
      "description": "German component of the ESS Round 10; includes measures of trust in the police and legal system, feelings of safety, and experiences of crime.",
      "host": "GESIS",
      "countries": ["Germany"],
      "year": 2020,
      "keywords": ["Crime", "Law enforcement", "Police", "Legal system", "Safety", "Trust"]
    },
    {
      "title": "European Social Survey Round 5 – Germany",
      "description": "ESS Round 5 data for Germany covering attitudes toward the police and courts, perceived safety, and crime-related experiences.",
      "host": "GESIS",
      "countries": ["Germany"],
      "year": 2010,
      "keywords": ["Crime", "Law enforcement", "Police", "Courts", "Safety", "Trust"]
    },
    {
      "title": "European Values Study 2017 – Germany",
      "description": "German EVS wave capturing values and institutional confidence; includes confidence in the police and justice system and attitudes toward law and order.",
      "host": "GESIS",
      "countries": ["Germany"],
      "year": 2017,
      "keywords": ["Law enforcement", "Police", "Justice system", "Confidence", "Values"]
    },
    {
      "title": "European Values Study 2008 – Germany",
      "description": "German EVS wave focusing on values and institutional trust; includes confidence in the police and courts and attitudes toward social order.",
      "host": "GESIS",
      "countries": ["Germany"],
      "year": 2008,
      "keywords": ["Law enforcement", "Police", "Courts", "Justice system", "Confidence", "Values"]
    }
  ]
}
